stemHtml:
From the factors below, select the option which includes the factors which would increase the effect or lower the threshold for hypoxic hypoxia:

1. Alcohol consumption
2. Duration of exposure
3. Pressure altitude above 20 000 ft
4. Age over 35
5. Physical exertion at altitude
6. Humidity
7. High Temperature
8. Fatigue
9. Nausea
10. Scuba diving before the exposure
11. Caffeine consumption
12. Poor nutrition
13. Low humidity
